name: Lemonade Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Mix lemonade concentrate and water in a small bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over chicken in a larger bowl. Refrigerate for 2 hours or longer.
4. Drain the chicken and reserve the liquid.
5. Mix flour, salt, and pepper in a small paper bag.
6. Add well-drained chicken, one piece at a time, and shake to coat evenly.
7. Heat oil in a large skillet over moderate heat.
8. Add floured chicken; cook until evenly browned, turning pieces carefully.
9. Remove chicken and arrange in a single layer in a shallow baking pan.
10. Brush chicken with melted butter.
11. Add reserved lemonade.
12. Bake uncovered for about 1 hour, basting the chicken with lemonade from the pan every 15 minutes.
13. About 15 minutes before the chicken is done, drain off excess juice from the pan.
14. Serve hot.
